_comment: MULTI-MATCH Phase 0 queue. The orchestrator captures each match in turn into data/<label>/ with its own REPORT.txt. Coins are the Yes/side-0 outcome of each market (coin = #<10*outcome>), taken from Hyperliquid outcomeMeta questions Q38/Q37/Q35. coins order = [home_win, draw, away_win].
